fields.name: includeCredentialsInQuery
fields.description: Whether credentials should be included in the query. Occasionally, some servers may not parse the Authorization header correctly (if you see a “Consumer key is missing” error when authenticating over SSL, you have a server issue). In this case, you may provide the consumer key/secret as query string parameters instead.
